learning.accessExpiration.deadline: Upgrade by {date} to get unlimited access to the course as long as it exists on the site.
learning.accessExpiration.body: You lose all access to this course, including your progress, on {date}.
advertisements.upgradeNotification.pastE: The upgrade deadline for this course passed. To upgrade, enroll in the next available session.
advertisements.upgradeNotification.expir: You will lose all access to this course, {includingAnyProgress}, on {date}.
Upgrading your course enables you to pursue a verified certificate and unlocks numerous features. Learn more about the {benefitsOfUpgrading}.
course-home.section-outline.section-item: Limited content. Upgrade for full access.
course-home.section-outline.sequence-ite: {lockedStatus, select, partial {Limited content} other {Not Available}}. Upgrade for full access.
course-home.section-outline.upgrade-bann: Upgrade today and enjoy unlimited access to all course material.
learning.upgrade-modal.title: Pursue a verified certificate
advertisements.upsell.verifiedCertBullet: Earn a {verifiedCertLink} of completion to showcase on your resumé
advertisements.upsell.unlockGradedBullet: Unlock your access to all course activities, including {gradedAssignmentsInBoldText}
advertisements.upsell.fullAccessBullet: {fullAccessInBoldText} to course content and materials, even after the course ends
upsell.features.access: Unlimited access to all course materials
upsell-table.table-row.audit.not-include: This feature is included in the verified track
